## Type of change

- [ ] Add project(s)
- [ ] New category
- [ ] Fix (broken link, description, etc.)
- [ ] Other

## Project(s) added

For each project added, indicate:
- Repository URL
- URL of the EU regulation/institution/standard it supports (e.g., eur-lex.europa.eu, eurostat.ec.europa.eu)
-->

| Project | EU regulation/institution |
|---------|--------------------------|
| https://github.com/... | https://... |

## Checklist

- [ ] The project is **open source** with a public repository.
- [ ] The project provides **support specifically for Europe** — EU institutions, regulations, standards, or cross-border infrastructure (not software specific to a single country).
- [ ] The project is **maintained** (activity in the last 3 years, not archived).
- [ ] The entry follows the format: `- [Name](URL) - Description with capital letter and period.`
- [ ] The description **does not start with the project name**.
- [ ] There are no **duplicates** in the list.
- [ ] The entry is at the **end of the corresponding category**.
- [ ] I ran `npx awesome-lint` with no errors.
